       / __/  ____ ___  ___   / __/ ___ _  / /

  # Github # https://github.com/2881099/FreeSql v3.5.308

    FreeSql quickly generates entity classes from database

    Update tool: dotnet tool update -g FreeSql.Generator


  # Quick Start #

  > FreeSql.Generator -Razor 1 -NameOptions 0,0,0,0 -NameSpace MyProject -DB "MySql,Data Source=127.0.0.1;..."

     -Razor 1                  * Select template: Entity class + attributes
     -Razor 2                  * Select template: Entity class + attributes + navigation properties
     -Razor "d:\diy.cshtml"    * Custom template file, if garbled please modify to UTF8 (without BOM) encoding format

     -NameOptions              * 4 boolean values correspond to:
                                 First letter uppercase
                                 First letter uppercase, others lowercase
                                 All lowercase
                                 Underscore to camelCase

     -NameSpace                * Namespace

     -DB "MySql,data source=127.0.0.1;port=3306;user id=root;password=root;initial catalog=database;charset=utf8;sslmode=none;max pool size=2"
     -DB "SqlServer,data source=.;integrated security=True;initial catalog=database;pooling=true;max pool size=2"
     -DB "PostgreSQL,host=127.0.0.1;port=5432;username=postgres;password=123456;database=database;pooling=true;maximum pool size=2"
     -DB "Oracle,user id=user1;password=123456;data source=//127.0.0.1:1521/XE;pooling=true;max pool size=2"
     -DB "Sqlite,data source=document.db"
     -DB "Firebird,database=localhost:D:\fbdata\EXAMPLES.fdb;user=sysdba;password=123456;max pool size=2"
     -DB "Dameng,server=127.0.0.1;port=5236;user id=2user;password=123456789;database=2user;poolsize=2"
     -DB "KingbaseES,server=127.0.0.1;port=54321;uid=USER2;pwd=123456789;database=database"
     -DB "ShenTong,host=127.0.0.1;port=2003;database=database;username=SYSDBA;password=szoscar55;maxpoolsize=2"
                               * Dameng(Dameng Database)、KingbaseES(KingbaseES Database)、ShenTong(ShenTong Database)

     -Filter                   Table+View+StoreProcedure
                               Default generation: Table + View + StoreProcedure
                               If you don't want to generate views and stored procedures -Filter View+StoreProcedure

     -Match                    Table name or regex, only generate matching tables, e.g.: dbo\.TB_.+
     -Json                     NTJ、STJ、NONE
                               Newtonsoft.Json, System.Text.Json, None

     -FileName                 File name, default: {name}.cs
     -Output                   Save path, default is current shell directory
                               Recommend creating gen.bat in entity class directory, double-click to regenerate all entity classes
     -Lang                     Language, cn=Chinese, en=English
